title: Gemma 4 Multimodal and Multilingual Models Launch
key_points: New Gemma 4 models are multimodal and multilingual, designed for scalable deployments from data centers to edge devices.
They meet demand for local deployment, on-prem security, cost efficiency, and low-latency use cases.
Improvements in efficiency and accuracy make them suitable for reasoning, coding, agents (with function calling), and various vision, video, and audio tasks.
They support interleaved multimodal input (text and images) and over 140 languages, with out-of-the-box support for 35+ languages.
The bundle includes four models, including Gemma’s first MoE model, all fitting on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU.
High-performing 31B and 26B A4B variants for local and data center use, and E4B/E2B for on-device/mobile applications.
